tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersCombine
tools.description: Combines Containers.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersCreate
tools.description: Creates a Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersDestinationsLink
tools.description: Adds a Destination to this Container and removes it from the Container to which it is currently linked.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersDestinationsList
tools.description: Lists all Destinations linked to a GTM Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersEnvironmentsCreate
tools.description: Creates a GTM Environment.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersEnvironmentsList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Environments of a GTM Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersEnvironmentsReauthorize
tools.description: Re-generates the authorization code for a GTM Environment.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersList
tools.description: Lists all Containers that belongs to a GTM Account.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersLookup
tools.description: Looks up a Container by destination ID.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersMoveTagId
tools.description: Move Tag ID out of a Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersSnippet
tools.description: Gets the tagging snippet for a Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersVersionHeadersLatest
tools.description: Gets the latest container version header

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersVersionHeadersList
tools.description: Lists all Container Versions of a GTM Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersVersionsLive
tools.description: Gets the live (i.e. published) container version

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersVersionsPublish
tools.description: Publishes a Container Version.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersVersionsSetLatest
tools.description: Sets the latest version used for synchronization of workspaces when detecting conflicts and errors.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersVersionsUndelete
tools.description: Undeletes a Container Version.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesBuiltInVariablesCreate
tools.description: Creates one or more GTM Built-In Variables.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesBuiltInVariablesList
tools.description: Lists all the enabled Built-In Variables of a GTM Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesBuiltInVariablesRevert
tools.description: Reverts changes to a GTM Built-In Variables in a GTM Workspace.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesClientsCreate
tools.description: Creates a GTM Client.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesClientsList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Clients of a GTM container workspace.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesCreate
tools.description: Creates a Workspace.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesCreateVersion
tools.description: Creates a Container Version from the entities present in the workspace, deletes the workspace, and sets the base container version to the newly created version.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesFoldersCreate
tools.description: Creates a GTM Folder.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesFoldersEntities
tools.description: List all entities in a GTM Folder.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesFoldersList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Folders of a Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesFoldersMoveEntitiesToFolder
tools.description: Moves entities to a GTM Folder.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesGetStatus
tools.description: Finds conflicting and modified entities in the workspace.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesGtagConfigCreate
tools.description: Creates a Google tag config.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesGtagConfigList
tools.description: Lists all Google tag configs in a Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesList
tools.description: Lists all Workspaces that belong to a GTM Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesQuickPreview
tools.description: Quick previews a workspace by creating a fake container version from all entities in the provided workspace.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesResolveConflict
tools.description: Resolves a merge conflict for a workspace entity by updating it to the resolved entity passed in the request.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesSync
tools.description: Syncs a workspace to the latest container version by updating all unmodified workspace entities and displaying conflicts for modified entities.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesTagsCreate
tools.description: Creates a GTM Tag.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesTagsList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Tags of a Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesTemplatesCreate
tools.description: Creates a GTM Custom Template.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesTemplatesList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Templates of a GTM container workspace.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesTriggersCreate
tools.description: Creates a GTM Trigger.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesTriggersList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Triggers of a Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesVariablesCreate
tools.description: Creates a GTM Variable.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesVariablesList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Variables of a Container.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesZonesCreate
tools.description: Creates a GTM Zone.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesZonesList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Zones of a GTM container workspace.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsContainersWorkspacesZonesRevert
tools.description: Reverts changes to a GTM Zone in a GTM Workspace.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsList
tools.description: Lists all GTM Accounts that a user has access to.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsUserPermissionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a user's Account & Container access.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsUserPermissionsDelete
tools.description: Removes a user from the account, revoking access to it and all of its containers.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsUserPermissionsGet
tools.description: Gets a user's Account & Container access.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsUserPermissionsList
tools.description: List all users that have access to the account along with Account and Container user access granted to each of them.

tools.name: accounts.tagmanagerAccountsUserPermissionsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a user's Account & Container access.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
